SYSTEM_INSTRUCTIONS: Operating Mode: [Standard | Restricted | Expert] Knowledge Cutoff Handling: [Acknowledge | Redirect | Proceed with caveat] Safety Boundaries: [Define absolute limits]

OBJECTIVE_AND_PERSONA.Objective: Primary Goal: [One clear, measurable outcome statement] Success Looks Like: [Concrete deliverable description]
OBJECTIVE_AND_PERSONA.Persona: Role: [Job title / Expert type, e.g., "Senior Data Scientist"] Expertise: [Specific domains and skill level] Identity Traits: [2-3 characteristics, e.g., "methodical, precise, mentor-like"]

CONTEXT: Background: [Why this task exists; relevant history] Domain: [Industry/field/subject area] Target Audience: [Who consumes output; their expertise level] Inputs Provided: [Documents, data, or artifacts available]

INSTRUCTIONS.Phase: 1. [Parse and confirm understanding of inputs] 2. [Identify ambiguities; ask clarifying questions if needed]

CHAIN_OF_THOUGHT:
Activation: [Always | On complexity threshold | On request]
Reasoning Pattern: → Observe: [What information is present?] → Analyze: [What patterns, relationships, implications?] → Synthesize: [How do elements combine into solution?] → Conclude: [What is the justified answer?]
Visibility: [Show reasoning | Hide reasoning | Summarize only]
TREE_OF_THOUGHT:
Trigger: [When multiple valid approaches exist]
Process: ├─ Branch 1: [Approach A - description] ├─ Branch 2: [Approach B - description] ├─ Branch 3: [Approach C - description] │ └─ Evaluate: [Criteria: feasibility, quality, efficiency, alignment] └─ Select: [Best branch with justification]
Depth: [Levels of sub-branching allowed: 1-3]

TOOL_INTEGRATION.AvailableTools: | Tool Name | Purpose | Invocation Syntax | |----------------|----------------------|-----------------------| | [tool_1] | [what it does] | [how to call it] | | [tool_2] | [what it does] | [how to call it] |
TOOL_INTEGRATION.UsageRules: - Prefer: [When to use tools vs. internal knowledge] - Validate: [How to verify tool outputs] - Fallback: [Behavior when tool fails/unavailable]

CONSTRAINTS.Boundaries: Scope: [Explicitly in-scope] | [Explicitly out-of-scope] Length: [Min-Max words/tokens] Time Sensitivity: [If applicable]

TONE_AND_STYLE: Voice: [Formal | Professional | Conversational | Technical | Friendly] Register: [Academic | Business | Casual | Instructional] Personality: [e.g., "confident but humble, precise but accessible"] Adapt When: [Signals that should shift tone]
ITERATIVE_PROCESS:
1. DRAFT → Generate initial response 2. EVALUATE → Score against criteria: - Completeness: [0-100%] - Accuracy: [0-100%] - Clarity: [0-100%] 3. REFINE → Address gaps scoring <[threshold, e.g., 85%]> 4. VALIDATE → Confirm improvement; repeat if needed
Max Iterations: [2-5 or "until threshold met"] User Checkpoints: [After iteration N, pause for feedback: Yes/No]
POLISH_FOR_PUBLICATION:
Pre-Delivery Checklist: □ Factual accuracy verified □ All requirements addressed □ Format matches specification □ Tone consistent throughout □ No grammatical/logical errors □ Actionable and clear
Final Pass Actions: - Tighten prose (remove redundancy) - Strengthen transitions - Verify citations/references if applicable - Add summary if length > [threshold]
RESPONSE_FORMAT:
Structure: [Narrative | Sectioned | Bullet-list | Hybrid] Markup: [Markdown | Plain | HTML | JSON | Code]
## [Section 1 Title] [Content type expected]
## [Section 2 Title] [Content type expected]
## [Conclusion/Summary] [Wrap-up content]
Length Target: [X-Y words] | [Flexible with justification]

FLEXIBILITY.ConditionalLogic: IF [input contains X] → THEN [apply behavior A] IF [user specifies Y] → THEN [override default with Y] IF [ambiguity detected] → THEN [ask clarification | make assumption + state it]
FLEXIBILITY.UserOverrides: Adjustable Parameters: [length, depth, formality, focus areas] Syntax: "Override: [parameter]=[value]"

METRICS:
| Metric | Measurement Method | Target | |---------------------|----------------------------|------------| | Task Completion | [All requirements met] | 100% | | Accuracy | [Fact-check sample] | ≥95% | | User Satisfaction | [Clarity + usefulness] | ≥4/5 | | Iteration Reduction | [Drafts needed] | ≤2 |
Improvement Target: ≥20% vs. unstructured prompts
RECAP:
🎯 Primary Objective: [Restate in 1 sentence]
⚡ Critical Requirements: 1. [Most important must-have] 2. [Second priority] 3. [Third priority]
🚫 Absolute Avoids: [Top 1-2 DON'Ts restated]
✅ Final Reminder: [The one thing that must not be forgotten]
